command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
LF="/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log"
echo "=== TIGHT WATCH 70s. Send: @RemyDeviDollz_bot hello ==="
LB=$(wc -l < "$LF" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
FOUND=0
for i in $(seq 1 14); do
  sleep 5
  CHUNK=$(tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null)
  # Look for the message arriving with its text + the decision
  TEXT=$(echo "$CHUNK" | grep -oE '"text":"[^"]*hello[^"]*"|"text":"[^"]*Remy[^"]*"' | tail -2)
  REASON=$(echo "$CHUNK" | grep -oE '"reason":"[^"]*"' | tail -2)
  TOOLP=$(echo "$CHUNK" | grep -c "tool policy removed")
  SEND=$(echo "$CHUNK" | grep -iE "sendMessage|auto-reply.*deliver|reply.*sent|telegram.*outbound" | tail -1 | cut -c1-120)
  if [ -n "$TEXT$REASON$SEND" ] || [ "$TOOLP" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "--- +$((i*5))s --- text:[$TEXT] reason:[$REASON] agentRan:[$TOOLP] sent:[$SEND]"
    FOUND=1
  fi
done
echo ""
echo "=== Final decision summary for this window ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '"reason":"[^"]*"' | sort | uniq -c
echo "agent processings: $(tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'tool policy removed')"
REMOTE
